top_signals.title: Gold Advances After Negotiators Flag Headway in US-Iran Talks
top_signals.summary: Gold rose as US and Iran negotiations made headway after a rocky start, with the two sides attempting to reach a peace deal within two months and formally end a war that’s roiled the global markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ukraine launches ‘TrophyLab’ platform to share captured Russian weapons with allies
top_signals.summary: Among the listed items available for study are, for example, a Kinzhal hypersonic missile and a T-90M tank.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Australian sugar producer works to restore operations as ransomware group claims attack
top_signals.summary: Mackay Sugar said it was "working urgently" to verify claims that a highly active ransomware group was behind a cyberattack that shut down harvesting and milling operations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
